nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 鸠鸽科
nodes.summary: 鸠鸽科（Columbidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

nodes.name: Band-tailed pigeon
nodes.summary: Band-tailed pigeon（Band-tailed pigeon，学名 Patagioenas fasciata），分类上属于鸽形目，并归入鸠鸽科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于美洲，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联1443种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等1443种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸽形目
nodes.summary: 鸽形目（Columbiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

nodes.name: 美洲
nodes.summary: 美洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Pied-billed grebe、Pale-vented pigeon等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: fasciata }} The band-tailed pigeon (Patagioenas fasciata) is a pigeon native to the Americas, and one of the largest pigeons in this region. It is largely gray, but with a thin white collar on the nape and a purple-gray breast

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: According to the North American Breeding Survey, the population of band-tailed pigeons in North America has declined at an average rate of 2% every year since 1968, primarily due to deforestation. Forest management, a practice that is supposed to promote forest environmental, economic, and social goals, can harm the band-tailed pigeons due to its suppression of shrubs and hardwood growth

links.label: 属于
links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: Band-tailed pigeon 属于目 鸽形目。

links.label: 属于
links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: Band-tailed pigeon 属于科 鸠鸽科。

links.label: 属于目
links.evidence: 依据 birds.csv 中的 order / order_cn 与 family / family_cn 字段补充。

links.label: 属于科
links.evidence: 依据 birds.csv 中的 family / family_cn 字段补充。
